title: Under Trump's Nasa, moon rocket from Boeing faces uncertain future
summary_full: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully sent astronauts around the moon using Boeing's rocket. However, the Trump administration is now seeking cheaper alternatives from competitors like SpaceX for future lunar endeavors. This move puts pressure on NASA's leadership to deliver on ambitious moon landing goals by 2028, despite the established but costly nature of current programs.
